title: Ventura County SFR near Lake Casitas — explicit WUI callout, out of pilot
project_address: 12100 Santa Ana Rd, Ventura County (unincorporated), CA 93001
notes: Second VHFHSZ fixture so the gate has variety in plan-text phrasing.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 12100 SANTA ANA RD, VENTURA COUNTY (UNINCORPORATED, near Lake Casitas)
Wildland-Urban Interface (WUI) zone — Very High Fire Hazard Severity Zone
CBC Chapter 7A wildfire-resistive materials required throughout exterior envelope
Occupancy Group: R-3
Construction Type: V-B sprinklered (NFPA 13D)
Number of stories: 1
Total building area: 2,100 sf
Class A roof, ignition-resistant siding, ember-resistant vents per CBC 706A/707A
Ventura County FPD defensible space review required
